title: Data Subject Access Requests (DSAR) Automation
description: Design high-performance Search and Extract engines to aggregate a user's entire PII footprint on demand. Architect systems capable of crawling distributed microservices, data lakes, and cold storage for DSAR fulfillment.
objectives: Design high-performance Search and Extract engines to aggregate a user's entire PII footprint on demand.
Architect systems capable of crawling distributed microservices, data lakes, and cold storage for DSAR fulfillment.
